creator: ziaee@FreeBSD.org
text:
"The new installer is expected to increase the attractiveness of the system for users who are accustomed to graphical installers and perceive text interfaces as outdated."

FreeBSD has an exceptionally consistent, elegant, and efficient entirely text based interface which comprises the base system. People will be astonished after a graphical bootloader then graphical installer drops them into a text interface after installing the system.

To be clear, this is amazing work and I hope all of our graphical downstreams are collaborating and using it. But, there's not a lot of spaces left for people who need a moderm advanced operating system, not a toy, and prefer TUI. This has always been one of those spaces.

Thanks everyone, and sorry to speak up in a critical way.
